## Summary of changes

Describe the change in a few sentences.

## Related issue

Link the issue this pull request closes or supports.

## Screenshots

Add screenshots if the change affects a visual workflow or user-facing output.

## Testing performed

List the checks you ran and any results that help reviewers understand the change.

## Checklist before merge

- [ ] The change is small and focused.
- [ ] The related issue is linked.
- [ ] Screenshots or notes are included when relevant.
- [ ] Testing has been performed and noted.
- [ ] Documentation has been updated if needed.
